title: Disillusion.
content:
You mortals see the sky - 
     I only see the ground,
    As through the air I fly.
    You mortals see the sky,
    And yet with envy sigh
     Because to earth you're bound!
    You mortals see the sky - 
     I only see the ground!
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Paul Bewsher delivers a powerful performance in "Disillusion."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
